name: gatecheck-notes
description: Notes — GateCheck cinematographer toolkit. A MindChuk-style sticky-note board. Cloudflare Worker on Hono, shares the gatecheck D1 + R2.

scripts.db:console:local: wrangler d1 execute gatecheck-auth --command="SELECT id, kind, substr(content,1,40) FROM notes_notes" --local
scripts.db:console:remote: wrangler d1 execute gatecheck-auth --command="SELECT id, kind, substr(content,1,40) FROM notes_notes" --remote
